name: ChartGenEval: Corruption-Tested Multi-Dimensional Feedback for Rhythm-Game Chart Generation
summary: arXiv:2607.12857v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: A generated rhythm-game chart need not reproduce one official note sequence: many note choices can fit the same song and difficulty. Reference-note...
description: arXiv:2607.12857v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: A generated rhythm-game chart need not reproduce one official note sequence: many note choices can fit the same song and difficulty. Reference-note agreement therefore measures reconstruction, not the full design problem. We introduce ChartGenEval, a six-question evaluation framework with an automatic, corruption-tested core.
